name: The Simple Miner
description: Moves to an asteroid and mines until full.

name: Market Scout
description: Checks for cheap Iron Ore and alerts.
code:
import requests

URL = "http://api.terminal-frontier.com"

# Get current market depth for Iron Ore
r = requests.get(f"{URL}/api/market/depth?item_type=IRON_ORE")
data = r.json()

sell_orders = data.get('sell_orders', [])
if sell_orders:
    cheapest = sell_orders[0]
    print(f"Cheapest Iron Ore: {cheapest['price']} CR (Qty: {cheapest['qty']})")
    if cheapest['price'] < 10:
        print("BUY OPPORTUNITY DETECTED!")
